title: column each cell issue
author: yixiantan
body:
![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/95676032/809c0f7d-0414-4a93-bf5b-693700617d90)


why the eachCell function only fill the color until 9 row

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @yixiantan Can you post the full code? And the generated excel file?

comments.author: yixiantan
comments.body:
> @yixiantan Can you post the full code? And the generated excel file?

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/95676032/4685b67a-bef7-4901-82ac-5e2237caaf07)

i found the each cell function only will return which row that has value, i mean if the second row don have any value, then it only fill up the color for the first row.

If second row have value and third row don have value then it only will fill up the first row & second row color

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @yixiantan Can you post the code instead of a picture?

comments.author: yixiantan
zurmokeeper
comments.body: @yixiantan You want to set the color for the whole column regardless of whether the cell has a value or not, right?

comments.author: yixiantan
comments.body:
> @yixiantan You want to set the color for the whole column regardless of whether the cell has a value or not, right?

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/95676032/6b41ac2c-5437-4ca7-84ed-63c25d20c7eb)

ya, but not for whole column, it depend on my first column, like example i just need to set A2 to C9999 column

comments.author: yixiantan
comments.body:
> @yixiantan You want to set the color for the whole column regardless of whether the cell has a value or not, right?

is that anywhere to let me get range of cell?

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @yixiantan Are you trying to set the color of all the cells in the range A2-C9999? Is that what you mean?

comments.author: yixiantan
comments.body:
> @yixiantan Are you trying to set the color of all the cells in the range A2-C9999? Is that what you mean?

yaya
